inlineContent.text: improves automatic NTRIP reconnect behavior when correction data becomes stale.
Improved automatic NTRIP reconnect when GGA correction age remains above the configured threshold.
Added separate reconnect handling for stale correction data and interrupted NTRIP correction streams.

content.text: Stale correction while NTRIP data is still received

inlineContent.text: If GGA correction age is above the configured threshold and NTRIP correction data is still being received, the SDK treats this as a stale-correction case.
Reconnect delay: 3 seconds before the reconnect attempt starts.
Reconnect attempts: one automatic stale-correction reconnect attempt per cooldown window.
Cooldown: after the reconnect attempt starts, the SDK waits 3 minutes before allowing another automatic reconnect for the same stale-correction condition.
Applies to: cases where NTRIP data is flowing, but the correction age keeps increasing.
Does not apply to: interrupted NTRIP streams where correction data is no longer received.

content.text: Stale correction with interrupted NTRIP data

inlineContent.text: If GGA correction age is above the configured threshold and NTRIP correction data is no longer being received, the SDK treats this as a correction stream disruption.
Reconnect delay: 3 seconds between automatic reconnect attempts.
Reconnect attempts: up to 5 automatic attempts.
Cooldown: the 3-minute stale-correction cooldown does not apply.
Applies to: cases where correction age keeps increasing and the NTRIP correction stream has stalled or stopped.
If the NTRIP connection fails, reports a socket error, or enters an error state, the SDK uses the standard automatic reconnect behavior.
Reconnect delay: 3 seconds between automatic reconnect attempts.
Reconnect attempts: up to 5 automatic attempts.
Cooldown: the 3-minute stale-correction cooldown does not apply.
Applies to: NTRIP transport-level failures and connection errors.
Manual
remains available for applications that need to reconnect NTRIP explicitly.

abstract.text: Attempt to reconnect to the peripheral and/or correction tasks.
